channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: microsoft /PowerToys | C# | N/A
item.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

item.title: gorhill /uBlock | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: uBlock Origin - An efficient blocker for Chromium and Firefox. Fast and lean.

item.title: iv-org /invidious | Crystal | N/A
item.description: Invidious is an alternative front-end to YouTube

item.title: soxoj /maigret | Python | N/A
item.description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

item.title: ZhuLinsen /daily_stock_analysis | Python | N/A
item.description: LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: CJackHwang /ds2api | Go | N/A
item.description: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

item.title: abhigyanpatwari /GitNexus | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

item.title: ComposioHQ /awesome-codex-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

item.title: HunxByts /GhostTrack | Python | N/A
item.description: Useful tool to track location or mobile number

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: warpdotdev /warp | Rust | N/A
item.description: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.
